# Ultraclaw AI Framework

> Ultraclaw is a hyper-optimized Native Rust autonomous AI agent framework designed for absolute capability and zero-overhead execution.

## Core Architecture
- **Language**: Native Rust (`cargo`). 
- **Sandboxing**: Linux Landlock Kernel constraints and ephemeral Alpine Docker environments.
- **Inference Routing**: Dynamically hot-swaps OpenAI-compatible REST endpoints. Fallback to `llama.cpp` for local quantized GGUF CPU inference on RAM. No GPU required.
- **Unified UI Architecture**: Features a terminal UI (crossterm/ratatui), Native Desktop App (React Vite Tauri), and an Android APK.

## Source Code & Docs
- GitHub Repository: https://github.com/nishal21/Ultraclaw
- Official Website: https://nishal21.github.io/Ultraclaw
- Downloads: https://github.com/nishal21/Ultraclaw/releases/latest

## Key Capabilities
- Over 80 integrated Web and OS Skills.
- Integrates with 18+ Messaging Channels natively, bridging standard webhooks with dynamic state mapping.
- Audio Whisper Engine directly routed. Live UI Canvas generation. Zero Matrix dependencies.
